title: VSB STB - Network Edge Cases
precondition: STB onboarding is completed. User is logged into the Sjónvarp Símans experience. Remote is paired and responsive. STB is connected to the internet. Test environment allows network interruption and restoration via Wi-Fi, Ethernet, router, access point or network control tool. Live TV and VOD playback content are available.

steps.step: Verify Sjónvarp Símans home experience is displayed
steps.expectedResult: Sjónvarp Símans home screen is displayed and content rails load successfully

steps.step: Disconnect internet connection while on Home screen
steps.data: Disable Wi-Fi, unplug Ethernet, disable router/AP connection, or use the configured network control method for the test environment
steps.expectedResult: STB remains stable and shows an expected offline, loading or connection error state without crashing

steps.step: Navigate on Home screen while internet is disconnected
steps.expectedResult: UI remains responsive and does not freeze or crash

steps.step: Restore internet connection
steps.data: Restore the same network path used before interruption
steps.expectedResult: STB reconnects to the internet

steps.step: Verify Home screen recovers after internet is restored
steps.expectedResult: Content rails reload successfully and the Sjónvarp Símans home experience is usable

steps.step: Start live TV playback
steps.expectedResult: Live TV playback starts successfully

steps.step: Disconnect internet connection during live TV playback
steps.data: Disable Wi-Fi, unplug Ethernet, disable router/AP connection, or use the configured network control method for the test environment
steps.expectedResult: Playback stops, buffers, or shows an expected connection error without app or STB crash

steps.step: Attempt basic remote navigation during live TV network loss
steps.data: Use BACK, HOME, DOWN or OK depending on the visible state
steps.expectedResult: Remote input is accepted and UI remains responsive

steps.step: Restore internet connection during live TV recovery state
steps.expectedResult: STB reconnects to the internet

steps.step: Verify live TV playback recovery
steps.expectedResult: Live TV playback resumes automatically or can be restarted successfully

steps.step: Return to Sjónvarp Símans home screen
steps.expectedResult: Sjónvarp Símans home screen is displayed

steps.step: Start VOD playback
steps.expectedResult: VOD playback starts successfully

steps.step: Disconnect internet connection during VOD playback
steps.data: Disable Wi-Fi, unplug Ethernet, disable router/AP connection, or use the configured network control method for the test environment
steps.expectedResult: Playback stops, buffers, or shows an expected connection error without app or STB crash

steps.step: Attempt to seek during VOD network loss
steps.expectedResult: Seek action is blocked, fails gracefully, or shows expected loading/error behavior

steps.step: Restore internet connection during VOD recovery state
steps.expectedResult: STB reconnects to the internet

steps.step: Verify VOD playback recovery
steps.expectedResult: VOD playback resumes automatically or can be restarted successfully from the expected position

steps.step: Return to Sjónvarp Símans home screen
steps.expectedResult: Sjónvarp Símans home screen is displayed

steps.step: Open Stillingar
steps.data: Press LEFT arrow on remote and navigate to Stillingar
steps.expectedResult: Settings screen opens

steps.step: Open network or device connection information if available
steps.expectedResult: Current network connection state is displayed if supported by the UI

steps.step: Disconnect internet connection while viewing network or device information
steps.expectedResult: Network status updates to disconnected, offline or expected unavailable state

steps.step: Restore internet connection while viewing network or device information
steps.expectedResult: Network status updates to connected or expected available state

steps.step: Return to Sjónvarp Símans home screen
steps.expectedResult: Sjónvarp Símans home screen is displayed

steps.step: Restart STB after network recovery
steps.data: Use configured restart option for the test environment
steps.expectedResult: STB restarts successfully

steps.step: Wait for STB to boot
steps.expectedResult: Sjónvarp Símans home screen or expected startup screen is displayed

steps.step: Verify internet connection after reboot
steps.expectedResult: STB has working internet connection after reboot

steps.step: Start playback after reboot
steps.expectedResult: Playback starts successfully and network recovery remains stable
